narrative:
Precinct Convoy (precinct in Van Wert County) has 664 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.9 percentage points.
